site.name: Slave Computers
site.desc: Slave Computers, S.L. builds and deploys cloud business software and custom development from Botarell. Part of the SIAM Cloud group and creator of Fitoware.
news.title: News & updates
news.subtitle: Updates from Slave Computers, GestioERP, Fitoware and the SIAM Cloud group.
hero.badge: A SIAM Cloud group company · Botarell
hero.title2: to the daily use of a real company
hero.subtitle: Slave Computers builds, deploys and maintains cloud business software and custom projects. Over 15 years solving real problems for companies, from workshops and nurseries to builders and medical centres.
services.title: What we do for your company
services.subtitle: From deploying a cloud ERP to custom development when no off-the-shelf program fits.
srv.erp.d: GestioERP deployment: invoicing, POS, accounting and warehouse in the cloud. Modular — you pay only for what you use.
srv.custom.d: When the problem fits no standard program, we build it. Web, Android/iOS apps and back-office.
srv.fito.d: Our own product: the European plant passport and traceability for nurseries and ornamental plants.
srv.cloud.d: From the office server to the browser. No more buying hardware or backing up by hand.
srv.integration.d: We connect your systems: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, APIs, payment gateways and e-invoicing.
srv.support.d: Ongoing support. Updates, backups and help so you can focus on your business.
product.title: Fitoware, our software for nurseries
product.desc: Fitoware manages the botanical species catalogue and issues the European Plant Passport (EU Regulation 2016/2031) as a PDF with A·B·C·D elements and a QR code. Available in two editions: for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (with our partner IONNAVIS) and as a GestioERP module.
product.b1: Species catalogue linked to your items
product.b2: Plant passport in one click (2017/2313 format)
product.b3: Batch traceability and labels with EAN-13 and QR
group.title: Part of something bigger
group.desc: Slave Computers, S.L. is part of the SIAM Cloud group together with Pontsoft, S.L. Years of business-software and custom-development projects under one brand and one team.
cta.title: Shall we talk about your project?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what your company needs and we'll propose a solution: product, custom, or a mix of both.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Write to us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.name: Name
contact.note: This form is a mock-up. Connect it to your backend or mail service before publishing.
footer.tagline: Business software, custom development and Fitoware. A SIAM Cloud group company, from Botarell.
legal.title: Legal notice
legal.p1: This website (slave.net) is owned by Slave Computers, S.L., a company within the SIAM Cloud group, based in Botarell (Tarragona).
legal.p2: The site's purpose is to provide information about the business software, custom development services and the Fitoware product of Slave Computers, S.L.
legal.p3: The contents, trademarks and logos are protected by intellectual and industrial property rights. Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central is a trademark of Microsoft. GestioERP and Fitoware are trademarks of the SIAM Cloud group.
legal.p4: Data provided through the contact form is processed for the sole purpose of handling your request. You may exercise your rights of access, rectification and erasure by writing to the contact address.
wa.title: Chat on WhatsApp?
wa.prefill: Hi, I'd like more information about Slave Computers' services.
cookies.banner.text: We use our own technical cookies for the site to work and, with your permission, measurement cookies.
cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: This policy explains what cookies are, which ones slave.net uses and how you can manage them.
cookies.p1: A cookie is a small text file that a website stores in your browser. It is used to remember information about your visit, such as your language or preferences.
cookies.p2: We use technical cookies necessary for the site to work (for example, to remember your language choice and your cookie consent). If you accept, we may use anonymous measurement cookies to understand how the site is used.
cookies.p3: You can accept or reject non-essential cookies from the notice shown when you enter. You can also block or delete cookies from your browser settings at any time.
cookies.p4: We may update this policy to reflect technical or legal changes. We recommend reviewing it periodically.
locations.title: Two locations, one team
locations.subtitle: We work from Botarell and are present at the Mercat de Flor i Planta Ornamental de Catalunya, in Vilassar de Mar.
loc.botarell.name: Botarell office
loc.vilassar.name: Flower market · Vilassar de Mar
loc.vilassar.addr: Mercat de Flor i Planta Ornamental de Catalunya · Vilassar de Mar (Barcelona)
ch.title: Time tracking with timeTracker
ch.desc: GestioERP's time-tracking module records employees' working hours in line with art. 34.9 of the Spanish Workers' Statute (Royal Decree-law 8/2019). Clock-in, absences, payroll and terminals, all integrated into your management software.
ch.b1: Clock in from mobile, kiosk and physical terminal
ch.b2: Sealed record (HMAC-SHA256), tamper-proof and kept for 4 years
ch.b3: Absences, holidays, public holidays and work calendar
ch.b4: Quick payroll, hours report and certificate for the Labour Inspectorate
modules.title: Management modules ready for your company
modules.subtitle: We deploy GestioERP and switch on only the modules you need: invoicing, accounting, POS, CRM and time tracking.
demo.title: Try GestioERP live
demo.desc: Enter the online GestioERP demo and explore the ERP —invoicing, POS, accounting, warehouse— without installing anything. Use these access credentials:
demo.note: This is a demo environment; data is reset periodically.
support.title: Remote support and maintenance from our expert technicians
support.desc: An exclusive service for Slave Computers clients with a maximum response time of 4 hours for emergencies, dedicated email and phone, and on-site assistance if it cannot be solved remotely. No minimum contract period: you only pay if you are happy with the service.
support.tools: Already a client? Download the agent and connect in seconds:
support.b4: On-site assistance if not solved remotely
support.form.title: Need help? Write to us
mnt.title: Much more than software
mnt.subtitle: We maintain your equipment, networks and communications so everything runs without surprises.
mnt.1.d: Maintenance plans with on-site and remote support in under 24 h, plus warranty management.
mnt.2.d: Networks, servers, security and properly sized, stable infrastructure.
mnt.3.d: Cloud PBX with reduced rates and no call setup fee.
mnt.4.d: Professional Ubiquiti UniFi coverage with a prior survey: stable and secure across the whole hotel.
partners.title: Partners and technologies we work with
